channel.title: Enum on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Enum on TLDRBins

item.title: DNS Enum
item.description: Zone Transfer dig test.com axfr @10.10.11.10 Domain Discovery dig @10.10.11.10 test.com dig @10.10.11.10 -x 10.10.11.10 dig @10.10.11.10 +short test.com any dig @10.10.11.10 -t NS test.com dig @10.10.11.10 _gc.test.com

item.title: Drupal
item.description: droopescan Download droopescan droopescan scan drupal -u http://10.10.11.10 Note: This can take a long time to run

item.title: Find
item.description: Find files of type file find . -type f Find and Open find / -name test.txt -exec cat {} \; Find SUID bit set files find / -type f -user root \( -perm -4000 -o -perm -2000 \) 2>/dev/null -ls Find files owned by group find / -group adm 2>/dev/null | grep -v -e ^/proc Find files created between 1/1/2024 and 31/12/2024 find / -type f -newermt 2024-01-01 ! -newermt 2024-12-31 -ls 2>/dev/null Find files with capabilities find / -exec getcap {} \; 2>/dev/null

item.title: Mount Share
item.description: NFS List share showmount -e 10.10.11.10 Mount share sudo mount -t nfs 10.10.11.10:/share /mnt/share/ Others # Check all mounted drives mount # Check how shares are mounted cat /etc/exports +----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ |root_squash : running as root on local system will be treated as nobody user in target | |no_all_squash: every other users permission will translate from local system to target | +----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ SMB Mount share sudo mount -t cifs //10.10.11.10/share /mnt # With creds sudo mount -t cifs -o user=username,pass=password //10.

item.title: Nmap
item.description: Nmap Port Scan TCP Scan target=10.10.11.10 nmap -p- --min-rate 10000 -oA ./nmap-alltcp $target ports=$(cat nmap-alltcp.nmap| grep -Eo "^[0-9]+" | tr '\n' ',' | sed -r 's/,$//') nmap -p $ports -sCV -oA ./nmap-tcpscripts $target UDP Scan (common ports) target=10.10.11.10 nmap -sU --min-rate 10000 -oA ./nmap-udp $target ports=$(cat nmap-udp.nmap| grep -Eo "^[0-9]+" | tr '\n' ',' | sed -r 's/,$//') nmap -p $ports -sU -sCV -oA ./nmap-udpscripts $target Scan with nmap scripts Update scripts DB nmap --script-updatedb Search scripts nmap --script-help ftp* Scan with a script nmap --script=ftp-anon -sV -sC -p 21 10.

item.title: SMB Enum
item.description: SMB Share Enum Login without password smbmap smbmap -H 10.10.11.10 --no-banner smbmap -H 10.10.11.10 -u null --no-banner # List known share smbmap -H 10.10.11.10 -r 'share' smbclient smbclient -N -L \\\\10.10.11.10\\ #After found an accessible share smbclient -N \\\\10.10.11.10\\share\\ #After connection #List all files in a share recurse ON ls #Download all files mask "" recurse ON prompt OFF mget * # Fix: Unable to initialize messaging context. protocol negotiation failed: NT_STATUS_CONNECTION_DISCONNECTED smbclient -N -L \\\\10.

item.title: SMTP
item.description: SMTP User Enum perl smtp-user-enum.pl -M RCPT -U users.txt -t 10.10.11.10 Note: smtp-user-enum.pl

item.title: SNMP
item.description: onesixtyone Download onesixtyone # Brute force community string for snmpwalk use onesixtyone 10.10.11.10 -c /usr/share/doc/onesixtyone/dict.txt snmpwalk Installation sudo apt install snmp # Install Add-on for better result readability sudo apt install snmp-mibs-downloader # Comment out this line in /etc/snmp/snmp.conf # mibs : # Uncomment this line in /etc/snmp/snmp.conf mibdirs /usr/share/snmp/mibs:/usr/share/snmp/mibs/iana:/usr/share/snmp/mibs/ietf Basic Commands snmpwalk -v2c -c public 10.10.11.10 | tee snmpwalk_result # Query specific OID, e.g, ipAddressIfIndex.ipv6 snmpwalk -v2c -c public 10.

item.title: Subdomain Enum
item.description: wfuzz download wfuzz # HTTP wfuzz -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/DNS/bitquark-subdomains-top100000.txt -H "Host: FUZZ.example.com" -u http://example.com # HTTPS wfuzz -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/DNS/bitquark-subdomains-top100000.txt -H "Host: FUZZ.example.com" -u https://example.com -k Take note of the word size, Ctrl+C to interrupt the process, then run again wfuzz -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/DNS/bitquark-subdomains-top100000.txt -H "Host: FUZZ.example.com" -u http://example.com --hw 10 gobuster gobuster vhost -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/DNS/bitquark-subdomains-top100000.txt -u http://example.com Add domain/subdomain to /etc/hosts echo "10.10.11.10 example.com" | sudo tee -a /etc/hosts

item.title: Web Directory Enum
item.description: feroxbuster Download feroxbuster HTTP feroxbuster -u http://example.com/ --depth 1 --methods=GET,POST -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt HTTPS feroxbuster -u https://example.com/ -k --depth 1 --methods=GET,POST -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt Specify Extension feroxbuster -u http://example.com/ --methods=GET,POST --depth=1 -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt -x html, asp, aspx Add trailing slash / to each request feroxbuster -u http://example.com/ -f --depth 1 --methods=GET,POST -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt wfuzz Fuzzing Number Range wfuzz -z range,1-99 http://example.com/users/FUZZ gobuster Download gobuster gobuster dir -u http://example.com -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt -t 40 -x php
